notableEvents.label: Iván Herrera GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Iván Herrera grounds into a double play, third baseman Javier Sanoja to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Graham Pauley. JJ Wetherholt out at 2nd. Iván Herrera out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Cardinals challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: catcher Joe Mack picks off Nathan Church at 3rd on throw to third baseman Javier Sanoja.

notableEvents.label: Esteury Ruiz pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Esteury Ruiz flies out to left fielder Bryan Torres.

notableEvents.label: Leo Jiménez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Leo Jiménez singles on a ground ball to left fielder Bryan Torres.

notableEvents.detail: Joe Mack grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Leo Jiménez out at 2nd. Joe Mack out at 1st.
